They installed a new gutter on an existing flat roof, calculated the water flow and had two nice downspouts with one draining into a 2nd level roof and eavestrough which then drained into our garage pad trough.
Also, I would recommend the gutter guard product to protect the eavestrough from pine cones and other debris.
Mark and his team were professional, showed up on time, install a quality product and kept to their quote.

I would definitely be recommending his business to all who ask! Thank you very much Mark!
David and Joanne F","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Wallis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX125Jmpzz9pv6O7CUbFrACKAEmufK6uWlfNl5cyBD4koZNXhwe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our old, leaky, segmented plastic gutters were in dire need of replacement.  We wanted seamless metal gutters, so called Heritage for a quote.  They came within the week and gave us a fair quote.

Once scheduled, they showed up on-time ready to roll and got the job done pretty quickly.  I never thought I'd get such satisfaction from gutters that don't leak all over the place.

Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Stensrud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI1yU3bJqhHaam60a-ac3fuHamnvZnjhnSpP9x3QuTPzHiKTw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Andrew was top notch.  Excellent, fast communication to come check out the job and did a very nice installation on my home.  Very professional and nice crew who identified some deficiencies in my home and fixed them for me with no extra charge.  I would highly recommend them if you are looking for new gutters or repairs.  Thank you again Andrew!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jay H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxrlc9rneFUOE1WjpyLsKU2CSVZX60Vou6pMfR3Gsb4dx7bg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I heard about Andrew Hamilton and Heritage Gutters from two separate and enthusiastic referrals (one being our home inspector, who had used him for his own home’s gutter installation), and knew that as an out-of-town landlord he was the one I could trust for this job.

Andrew did not disappoint.

He was incredibly accommodating of my hectic schedule, and he visited the house multiple times to scope out the work and report back to me with the most effective plan of action. He was conscious of my budget and timeline and took every step to ensure those needs were met, while still recommending a great product called the Gutter Helmet which was specific to my home’s needs and will last despite my heritage home’s shortcomings.

When the work was ready to begin, Andrew took photos every step of the way and made sure to explain why he was doing what he was doing at every interval. I felt confident in his process every step of the way, and cannot recommend him enough. It feels great knowing that my home is protected from water damage, and Andrew made the whole project seem so easy.

Thanks Andrew!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"G Bradshaw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2eBx5lU7X8x7hRA0oMCnTiWSjRc9FA3e9XFcjByrlb0M1mw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Andrew did the gutters on our new house and garage in New Denver.  A round trip for him approximating 225 km.  Installation was in the fall and he explained the need to come back in the summer and finish "screwing off" the long runs exposed to sun and thus avoid kinking when they would get hot the following summer.  He assured me there was no need to call him that he had it in his book and would return to finish.
Indeed he had scheduled himself to come out and finish the screwing off.  He also made a couple of changes for us to accommodate stone sticking out interfering with the down spouts.  I asked for a bill but was informed that the work was included in the project.  Amazing . . . don't get that too many places anymore.
II'm fussy, just ask our builder.  I found that Andrew was focused and efficient during both the installation and on the return trip to finish the attaching gutters and adding the few changes for us.  Honestly, I can't imagine anyone providing a better service.  He has all the equipment, he's efficient, reliable, and I feel I received excellent value for the work Andrew performed.
Andrew and Heritage Gutters  receive my highest recommendation.  Fantastic work Andrew - thank you.","Images":null,"When":""}]
